title: StackQL Audit Payload
description: Canonical run report emitted by scripts/publish.py and POSTed to a reporting backend (run-report.json). One document per audit run.

run_id.description: Stable id for the run (GitHub run id, RUN_STAMP, or a wall-clock stamp). Shared by every finding so dashboards can dedupe re-runs.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp the report was generated (ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-06-02T23:33:35Z).

target.description: Deep target this report was produced for (e.g. s3, aws-regions, gcp-org, azure-org, entra). Absent for aggregated multi-target reports.

total.description: Total number of findings in this report.

highest.description: Highest severity present, or NONE when there are no findings.

run_id.description: Run id this finding belongs to (matches the top-level run_id).

ts.description: UTC timestamp the finding record was emitted.

target.description: Deep target the finding came from (e.g. s3, aws-regions, gcp-org, azure-org, entra).

check_id.description: Identifier of the check (its YAML id, or the check file path).

fields.description: The raw finding row from the audit stream, preserved verbatim. Keys vary by check/target (e.g. region, subscription, bucket, resource attributes).
